interactions.prompt: What is a good failure mode for a linear SVM in a classification setting that connects to an assumption in the paper?
interactions.response_summary: LLM suggested non-linearly separable data as the primary failure mode, connecting to the linearity assumption.
interactions.student_modification: Added class imbalance on top of non-linearity — the combination was my own idea to strengthen connection to Assumption 3.
interactions.purpose: Brainstorming which failure mode to use

interactions.prompt: What is a concrete modification to linear Pegasos to handle non-linear data?
interactions.response_summary: LLM mentioned Random Fourier Features (Rahimi & Recht, 2007) as an explicit kernel approximation approach.
interactions.student_modification: N/A — used as the 1-sentence suggestion in the failure mode section.
interactions.purpose: Identifying a concrete modification to suggest at the end of the failure mode analysis
